result.short_answer: Machine Learning (ML) is a subset of artificial intelligence that involves the use of algorithms and statistical models to enable machines to perform a specific task without using explicit instructions.

It involves the use of algorithms and statistical models
ML enables machines to perform tasks without explicit instructions
